subcodes.first_line: In this day, that which is beloved at the Throne is the teaching of God's Cause, and thus hath the decree gone forth from the Chosen One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم آنچه لدی العرش محبوب تبلیغ امر الله است و کذلک قضی الامر من لدی المختار
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @chastisement and requital, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
